text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after having won many races, Narita
Taishin drops by.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So, about that hot spring ticket...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Both Ticket and Hayahide are busy, and I've got
no one else to go with me, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... If you've got nothing better to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here—it's time to use the vacation
ticket we won at the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first... I have to get through the mountains of
paperwork that's piled up over the course of the
Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I roll up my sleeves and bury myself in work for
the next few days.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And that's everything! Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um, you appear to be rather exhausted. Make
sure to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to finish up all of my work, and the next
day quickly rolls around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay. The schedule's fine with me, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you're okay to go on vacation
looking like that? I feel like a light breeze could
knock you over.
choice_data_list:
I can wash my exhaustion away in the hot
spring!

I can wash my exhaustion away in the hot
spring!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Meh. It's your funeral.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so we set off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who chooses such a decked out place for the
prize of some shopping raffle?
choice_data_list: I bet the hot spring will be amazing!
I bet the hot spring will be amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel much better after my bath. It seems the long
soak really did take away my exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My head feels a little light, but I'm sure the
dizziness will fade soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, did you just finish up too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure, it wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, your face is really red. Were you in the hot
water for too long?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Snap out of it! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Finally, you're awake. Do you remember getting
lightheaded and passing out?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you even know what you're apologizing for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If it's for ruining our trip or for collapsing and
being a pain...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll kick you right back into the hot spring.
Boil for all I care.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I talked with Tazuna earlier, and she said you
were working like mad so you could go on this
trip.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What am I supposed to do with you if you pass
out from exhaustion? Bonehead.
choice_data_list:
I thought this would be a good reward for all
your wins...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I think you might hold the record for
being the biggest dummy in the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin abruptly stretches her hand
towards me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Poke! Jab!
choice_data_list: Ow, ow, ow! What are you doing?!
Ow, ow, ow! What are you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The staff taught me a pressure point to get rid of
dizziness from heat exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Now stay there, and don't move!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her jabs are too much, and I shuffle away from
the painful prodding. I manage to escape her for
a moment, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop trying to get away.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Those teary eyes won't stop me. I'm not here to
be nice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Save. Your. Breath!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I hope you learned your lesson now. Don't push
yourself for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're the only person who's crazy enough to put
up with me and be my trainer, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't know what I'd do without you.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure there are plenty of people lining up to
be your trainer now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! That's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Get it through your thick head—you're the only
trainer for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You'd better get what I'm saying now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Narita Taishin and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during our trip.
